name: causal-halting
description: A Codex skill, prompt guard, DesignIR verifier, trace analyzer, real adapters, corpus evaluator, repair verifier, and Markdown reporter for prediction-feedback loops.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and refactor prediction-feedback loops in agent systems.
interface.longDescription: Causal Halting packages a Codex skill, low-cost UserPromptSubmit context guard, CHC-0 reference notes, explicit graph checker, DesignIR-only verifier, deterministic trace analyzer, generic workflow/OpenTelemetry/LangGraph adapters, DesignIR corpus evaluator, repair workflow, proof-obligation repair verifier, and Markdown/Mermaid reporter for separating structural prediction-feedback cycles from ordinary semantic undecidability. Natural language must be interpreted by the LLM into DesignIR before deterministic analysis.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this agent loop with CHC-0.
Check this halting-style graph for feedback.
Analyze this agent trace for current-run prediction feedback.
Repair this causal_paradox into a safe orchestrator boundary.
Convert annotated OpenTelemetry or LangGraph traces into CHC events.
Evaluate the DesignIR extraction corpus without parsing prose.
Render a CHC analysis as a Markdown/Mermaid report.
